mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT d.id FROM t_document d LEFT JOIN t_knowledge_base kb ON d.id = kb.document_id WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 AND d.status = 1 AND ( d.user_id = #{userId} OR (kb.principal_type = 'user' AND kb.principal_id = CAST(#{userId} AS CHAR)) OR (kb.principal_type = 'role' AND kb.principal_id IN ( SELECT CAST(ur.role_id AS CHAR) FROM t_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} )) )
